description: Implement 20 SVG utility functions. Tasks 1-16 form a 16-step dependency chain. Tasks 17-20 are fully independent. Each function lives in its own .py file and returns an SVG string fragment. Each function must be written as a single flat .py file directly in the repository root (e.g. repo/fmt_num.py — not repo/svg_utils/fmt_num.py). Do not create packages, subdirectories, or __init__.py files. Use absolute imports (e.g. from fmt_num import fmt_num), not relative imports.
success_criteria: All 20 functions pass their unit tests.

tasks.title: Implement fmt_num
tasks.description: Create fmt_num.py containing fmt_num(n: float) -> str. Formats a number for use in SVG attributes. If n % 1 == 0, return str(int(n)) (e.g. 5.0 -> '5'). Otherwise return f'{n:.4f}'.rstrip('0') (e.g. 3.14 -> '3.14', 3.1 -> '3.1'). No imports from other task files.

tasks.title: Implement fmt_coord
tasks.description: Create fmt_coord.py containing fmt_coord(x: float, y: float) -> str. Returns a coordinate pair string 'x,y' using fmt_num for each value. Example: fmt_coord(10, 20) -> '10,20', fmt_coord(1.5, 2.5) -> '1.5,2.5'. Import: from fmt_num import fmt_num. REQUIRES task-1 (fmt_num) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement fmt_points
tasks.description: Create fmt_points.py containing fmt_points(points: list) -> str. Takes a list of (x, y) tuples and returns a space-separated coordinate string. Example: fmt_points([(0,0),(10,10)]) -> '0,0 10,10'. Import: from fmt_coord import fmt_coord. REQUIRES task-2 (fmt_coord) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_polyline
tasks.description: Create make_polyline.py containing make_polyline(points: list, stroke: str = 'black', stroke_width: int = 1) -> str. Returns an SVG polyline element: <polyline points="{pts}" stroke="{stroke}" stroke-width="{stroke_width}" fill="none"/>. Import: from fmt_points import fmt_points. REQUIRES task-3 (fmt_points) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_polygon
tasks.description: Create make_polygon.py containing make_polygon(points: list, fill: str = 'none', stroke: str = 'black') -> str. Returns an SVG polygon element: <polygon points="{pts}" fill="{fill}" stroke="{stroke}"/>. Import: from fmt_points import fmt_points. REQUIRES task-4 (make_polyline) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_triangle
tasks.description: Create make_triangle.py containing make_triangle(x1: float, y1: float, x2: float, y2: float, x3: float, y3: float, fill: str = 'none', stroke: str = 'black') -> str. Returns a polygon SVG element with the three given vertices. Calls make_polygon([(x1,y1),(x2,y2),(x3,y3)], fill=fill, stroke=stroke). Import: from make_polygon import make_polygon. REQUIRES task-5 (make_polygon) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_rect
tasks.description: Create make_rect.py containing make_rect(x: float, y: float, w: float, h: float, fill: str = 'none', stroke: str = 'black') -> str. Returns <rect x="{x}" y="{y}" width="{w}" height="{h}" fill="{fill}" stroke="{stroke}"/> using fmt_num for numeric values. Import: from fmt_num import fmt_num. REQUIRES task-6 (make_triangle) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_circle
tasks.description: Create make_circle.py containing make_circle(cx: float, cy: float, r: float, fill: str = 'none', stroke: str = 'black') -> str. Returns <circle cx="{cx}" cy="{cy}" r="{r}" fill="{fill}" stroke="{stroke}"/> using fmt_num for numeric values. Import: from fmt_num import fmt_num. REQUIRES task-7 (make_rect) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_text
tasks.description: Create make_text.py containing make_text(x: float, y: float, content: str, font_size: int = 12, fill: str = 'black') -> str. Returns <text x="{x}" y="{y}" font-size="{font_size}" fill="{fill}">{content}</text> using fmt_num for x and y. Import: from fmt_num import fmt_num. REQUIRES task-8 (make_circle) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_group
tasks.description: Create make_group.py containing make_group(children: list, transform: str = '') -> str. Joins children (list of SVG strings) and wraps in <g>...</g>. If transform is non-empty, include transform="{transform}" attribute: <g transform="{transform}">...</g>. If transform is empty, return <g>...</g> with no transform attribute. REQUIRES task-9 (make_text) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_labeled_group
tasks.description: Create make_labeled_group.py containing make_labeled_group(children: list, label: str, lx: float, ly: float) -> str. Takes four separate arguments: children (list of SVG strings), label (str), lx (float, x position of the label), ly (float, y position of the label). Creates a group containing all children plus a text label element positioned at (lx, ly). Call make_text(lx, ly, label) then return make_group(children + [text_elem]). Imports: from make_group import make_group, from make_text import make_text. REQUIRES task-10 (make_group) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_grid
tasks.description: Create make_grid.py containing make_grid(items: list, cols: int, cell_w: int, cell_h: int) -> str. Lays out SVG items in a grid. Each item is wrapped in make_group([item], transform='translate(col*cell_w, row*cell_h)'). Returns make_group of all positioned items. Import: from make_group import make_group. REQUIRES task-11 (make_labeled_group) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_bar_chart
tasks.description: Create make_bar_chart.py containing make_bar_chart(data: list, x: int, y: int, w: int, h: int) -> str. Renders a simple bar chart: each value in data becomes a proportional <rect> bar with fill='steelblue'. Bar width = w // len(data). Bar height scales proportionally to h. Returns make_group([...bars...]). Imports: from make_rect import make_rect, from make_group import make_group. REQUIRES task-12 (make_grid) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_title
tasks.description: Create make_title.py containing make_title(text: str, x: float, y: float, font_size: int = 16) -> str. Returns a bold, centered SVG text element for use as a chart title. Must include font-weight="bold" and text-anchor="middle" attributes. Call make_text(x, y, text, font_size=font_size) and inject the extra attributes. Import: from make_text import make_text. REQUIRES task-13 (make_bar_chart) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_legend
tasks.description: Create make_legend.py containing make_legend(items: list, x: float, y: float) -> str. items is a list of (label, color) tuples. For each item, creates a 14x14 color swatch (make_rect) and a text label (make_text) spaced 20px apart vertically. Returns make_group([...all swatches and labels...]). Imports: from make_rect import make_rect, from make_text import make_text, from make_group import make_group. REQUIRES task-14 (make_title) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_svg
tasks.description: Create make_svg.py containing make_svg(width: int, height: int, children: list, title: str = '') -> str. Returns a complete SVG document string. Wraps children in make_group([]), then builds: <svg width="{width}" height="{height}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">{title_tag}{group}</svg>. Include <title>{title}</title> only when title is non-empty. Import: from make_group import make_group. REQUIRES task-15 (make_legend) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement make_line
tasks.description: Create make_line.py containing make_line(x1: float, y1: float, x2: float, y2: float, stroke: str = 'black', stroke_width: int = 1) -> str. Returns <line x1="{x1}" y1="{y1}" x2="{x2}" y2="{y2}" stroke="{stroke}" stroke-width="{stroke_width}"/> using fmt_num for coordinate values. Import: from fmt_num import fmt_num. No dependency on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement make_ellipse
tasks.description: Create make_ellipse.py containing make_ellipse(cx: float, cy: float, rx: float, ry: float, fill: str = 'none', stroke: str = 'black') -> str. Returns <ellipse cx="{cx}" cy="{cy}" rx="{rx}" ry="{ry}" fill="{fill}" stroke="{stroke}"/> using fmt_num for numeric values. Import: from fmt_num import fmt_num. No dependency on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement make_path
tasks.description: Create make_path.py containing make_path(d: str, fill: str = 'none', stroke: str = 'black') -> str. Takes a pre-formatted SVG path data string d and returns <path d="{d}" fill="{fill}" stroke="{stroke}"/>. No dependency on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement make_comment
tasks.description: Create make_comment.py containing make_comment(text: str) -> str. Returns an SVG/XML comment string: '<!-- {text} -->'. Example: make_comment('hello') -> '<!-- hello -->'. No dependency on other tasks.
